examples: The title goes to a newsmaker who has influenced events for better or for worse.
The tuneless plastic horn blown by fans was a top World Cup newsmaker and has been snapped up abroad.
The tuneless plastic horn blown by fans was a top World Cup newsmaker and has been snapped up abroad. Experts have warned it can damage hearing.
Warren was named the top newsmaker of the year for 2009 by the Religion Newswriters Association.
The live web-streaming of a newsmaker lessens the need to explain a low physical turn out.
